title: cyrtidium alatum
intro: Cyrtidium alatum, also known as the "Bird's Nest Fungus," is a type of edible fungus belonging to the family Cyrtidaceae. This fungus has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Cyrtidium alatum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of this fungus can be found in various forms, including dried powder, capsules, and tea, which are often used to support respiratory health and boost the immune system.
